_instructions: Paste each script block into the <head> of the indicated page on thezao.com. Remove this _instructions key before deploying.

script.name: The ZAO
script.description: Decentralized impact network for independent music artists. Weekly Fractal governance on Optimism mainnet since July 2024. Flagship app: WaveWarZ on Solana.

script.name: The ZAO
script.description: The ZAO — Decentralized Impact Network for Independent Artists

acceptedAnswer.text: The ZAO (ZTalent Artist Organization) is a decentralized impact network for independent music artists. Founded by Zaal Panthaki in July 2024, it runs weekly Fractal governance votes where members earn non-transferable Respect by peer ranking. As of July 2026: 100+ governance weeks, 157 Respect holders, and a flagship live-trading platform (WaveWarZ) with 1,245+ on-chain battles and 524+ SOL volume.

WaveWarZ is a live-traded song-vs-song battle platform on Solana. Artists are paid 1% of every trade instantly onchain. As of July 2026: 1,245+ battles, 524+ SOL total volume, 9.07 SOL paid to artists, $1,497 raised for charity. Program ID: 9TUfEHvk5fN5vogtQyrefgNqzKy2Bqb4nWVhSFUg2fYo.

The ZAO Fractal is a weekly peer-ranking governance session where members break into small groups, rank each other's contributions, and accumulate non-transferable Respect. 100+ consecutive weekly sessions since July 2024. Respect is settled onchain via two contracts on Optimism mainnet: OG ERC-20 (0x34cE89baA7E4a4B00E17F7E4C0cb97105C216957) and ZOR ERC-1155 (0x9885CCeEf7E8371Bf8d6f2413723D25917E7445c).

ZABAL Gamez is The ZAO's 3-month builder cohort. Builders ship products or features for the ZAO community and keep earning from what they build even after the cohort ends. Open enrollment twice per year.
The ZAO was founded by Zaal Panthaki (@bettercallzaal). WaveWarZ was co-founded within The ZAO by Hurricane (platform operator), Candy, and Ohnahji.

mainEntity.name: How do I join The ZAO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Three paths: (1) Battle on WaveWarZ at wavewarz.info — SOL wallet to trade, free to watch. (2) Attend a weekly Fractal governance call — runs every week on Farcaster Spaces since July 2024. (3) Apply for ZABAL Gamez — the 3-month builder cohort, open 2× per year. Community directory: thezao.com/community.

mainEntity.name: How does The ZAO make money?

acceptedAnswer.text: WaveWarZ charges a 3.16% take rate on buy volume, generating 17.44 SOL in platform revenue to date. Artists receive 1.79% of buy volume (9.07 SOL) directly and instantly onchain. Revenue above a 3.5 SOL operating floor is distributed: 33% operations, 22% each to co-founders Hurricane, Candy, and Zaal.
